visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a zebra-print bucket hat and a white lace top stands in a warehouse store aisle. She holds a large, white cylindrical pillow with a winking cartoon face. Behind her are shelves stocked with bedding sets and pillows. (2) She rotates the pillow, showing its length and a blue band around the middle. She gestures toward the product and points to the price tag on the shelf behind her. (3) She hugs the long pillow closely to demonstrate its size and softness. The camera cuts to her standing in front of a large cardboard display bin filled with these pillows. (4) She reaches into the bin and pulls out pillows with different facial expressions: one with sunglasses and a smirk, one with a simple smile and a red 'kiss' mark, and another winking one. (5) She places one of the pillows into her metal shopping cart, which already contains a box of snacks and a brown leather bag. The background remains the industrial warehouse setting of Costco.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 這是. (2) [Slogan]: 大人專用的. (3) [Slogan]: 799元. [Subtitle]: 好朋友 不要學抽煙哦. (4) [Slogan]: 超長的涼感抱枕. [Subtitle]: 他有100cm. 有沒有人睡覺也喜歡抱著跨睡的. 那它會很方便. 而且它這個枕套是可以拆下來機洗的. (5) [Subtitle]: 整個涼涼的很舒服. 還有它表情超酷的 你們看. 有墨鏡酷男. 然後可愛的貪吃臉. 跟很像查理布朗的臉哦可愛呀. 嘿咻.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is shown throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a black and white zebra-patterned bucket hat, a white floral lace long-sleeved top over a black dress, a black choker necklace, and a small brown shoulder bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse. Large industrial metal shelving units hold stacked boxes of bedding, cooling throws, and pillows. A large cardboard bin contains a bulk supply of the long white pillows being featured.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in an upbeat, enthusiastic tone, introducing a product. A cheerful, synth-based pop BGM plays at a steady moderate tempo in the background. (2) A clear 'ding' sound effect triggers as a price caption appears. The narrator continues her description, detailing the physical properties of the item with a slightly higher pitch. (3) A soft cartoonish 'whoosh' or 'pop' sound effect is heard as the narrator showcases different face designs on the product. Her voice remains high-arousal and energetic. (4) The narrator makes a small vocal effort sound ('hey-ho') while moving the items. The music continues consistently through to the end of the recording without any breaks or volume dips.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Variety Display -> Purchase Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and recommend a 100cm cooling body pillow found at Costco. The creator highlights its attractive features including the affordable price (799 TWD), large size, cooling sensation, washable cover, and various cute cartoon facial expressions to entice viewers to buy it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator focuses entirely on a specific product available at Costco, mentions the exact price, and actively demonstrates its features while encouraging a purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: An energetic retail vlog piece focused on a single product recommendation, using typical social media editing styles like text overlays and sound effects.
